name: Almond Poppy Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a 1-pound loaf pan.
2. In a large bowl, combine water, bread flour, dry milk powder, salt, butter, lemon yogurt, honey, and lemon extract. Mix until a soft dough forms.
3. Add the toasted almonds, dried lemon peel, poppy seeds, and yeast to the dough. Stir gently until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and let the dough rise in a warm place for about 1 hour, or until doubled in size.
5. Gently pour the risen dough into the prepared loaf pan, spreading it evenly.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the surface.
7. Remove from oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning the bread out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
